body:
Hi Meghan,

Just checking what time you're coming for Sunday dinner at the Pearl City house. Kai said he'd be over around 5. Bring an appetite — I'm making the chicken soup.

Love,
Mom
snippet: Hi Meghan,  Just checking what time you're coming for Sunday dinner at the Pearl...
subject: Sunday dinner this week?

body:
Hi Mom,

I'll be there around 5! I'm stopping by Grandma's in Mililani first, so I might be a few minutes late. Want me to bring rice or anything from Don Quijote on the way?

Love you,
Meghan
snippet: Hi Mom,  I'll be there around 5! I'm stopping by Grandma's in Mililani first, so...
subject: Re: Sunday dinner this week?

body: Hey! Feels like ages. Want to grab lunch this week? Craving that poke place by the clinic or we could try somewhere new. Let me know what works!
snippet: Hey! Feels like ages. Want to grab lunch this week? Craving that poke place by t...
subject: Lunch this week?

body: Yes please! Next week is slammed but Wednesday or Friday lunch would work. Poke sounds perfect honestly. Which day is better for you?
snippet: Yes please! Next week is slammed but Wednesday or Friday lunch would work. Poke ...
subject: Re: Lunch this week?

body: Wednesday works! How about 12? I'll be on my lunch break from the clinic so let's keep it close by. See you then!
snippet: Wednesday works! How about 12? I'll be on my lunch break from the clinic so let'...
subject: Re: Lunch this week?

body: Hi Meghan, hope you're doing well! Uncle Tad mentioned Grandma has a follow-up next week and I wanted to ask if you could come along — you're better than me at keeping track of what the doctors say. Even a quick call beforehand would help. Thanks, honey!
snippet: Hi Meghan, hope you're doing well! Uncle Tad mentioned Grandma has a follow-up n...
subject: Grandma's appointment

body: Hi Mom, of course. I can move things around to be there. Which day is it, and do we know which clinic? I'll jot down questions ahead of time so we don't forget anything. Let me know and I'll block it off.
snippet: Hi Mom, of course. I can move things around to be there. Which day is it, and do...
subject: Re: Grandma's appointment

body: Thank you so much, Meghan. It's Thursday morning. I'm a little worried about her memory lately — she repeated the same story twice on Sunday. I don't want to overreact, but I'd feel better with you there. Tad will drive her.
snippet: Thank you so much, Meghan. It's Thursday morning. I'm a little worried about her...
subject: Re: Grandma's appointment

body: Got it — Thursday morning works, I'll let Dr. Park know I'll be in a little late. Try not to worry too much before we know more; we'll ask the doctor directly and go from there. I'll bring the list of questions. Love you, see you Sunday.
snippet: Got it — Thursday morning works, I'll let Dr. Park know I'll be in a little late...
subject: Re: Grandma's appointment

body: Hi honey! I was looking at Hawaiian Airlines fares for a Maui weekend in July — there are decent ones leaving the 18th. Nothing booked yet, wanted to check your schedule first. Do those dates work? Thinking we keep it simple, just the two of us.
snippet: Hi honey! I was looking at Hawaiian Airlines fares for a Maui weekend in July — ...
subject: Maui weekend in July?

body: Hi Mom! July 18th works — I already blocked it off. Let's keep it low-key: a couple of beach days and one nice dinner. I found a small place in Kihei with good reviews. Want me to send the link?
snippet: Hi Mom! July 18th works — I already blocked it off. Let's keep it low-key: a cou...
subject: Re: Maui weekend in July?

body: Yes, send it! Kihei sounds perfect. Let's do three nights so we're not rushed. I'll bring the snacks for the flight. Should we rent a car or just stay close to the hotel?
snippet: Yes, send it! Kihei sounds perfect. Let's do three nights so we're not rushed. I...
subject: Re: Maui weekend in July?

body: Three nights is perfect. Let's rent a small car so we can drive up the coast one morning. I'll book the hotel once you confirm. July 18-21 locked in for me. Getting excited already!
snippet: Three nights is perfect. Let's rent a small car so we can drive up the coast one...
subject: Re: Maui weekend in July?

body: 18-21 works for me too. Go ahead and book! This is exactly what we both need. Send me the hotel link when you get a chance and I'll double-check the dates.
snippet: 18-21 works for me too. Go ahead and book! This is exactly what we both need. Se...
subject: Re: Maui weekend in July?

body: Hi Meghan, my car insurance renewal came and the premium went up about 8%. Before I just auto-renew, should I shop around? You're good at this stuff — any tips for comparing, or should I stick with what I have?
snippet: Hi Meghan, my car insurance renewal came and the premium went up about 8%. Befor...
subject: Car insurance renewal

body: Hey Mom, definitely worth shopping around. An 8% bump is common but you might find better. Get quotes from 2-3 others and make sure the coverage limits match. Ask about bundling if you have anything else with them. Send me what you find and I'll help you compare.
snippet: Hey Mom, definitely worth shopping around. An 8% bump is common but you might fi...
subject: Re: Car insurance renewal

body: Hi Meghan, just thinking of you with the CHT exam coming up. Are you keeping up with the Thursday review course? Don't run yourself ragged — make sure you're still sleeping and eating. Proud of you, honey.
snippet: Hi Meghan, just thinking of you with the CHT exam coming up. Are you keeping up ...
subject: CHT study check-in

body: Hey Mom, thanks. Yeah, I'm staying on top of the Thursday sessions and logging my hours — almost at 2,800 now. The practice exam is in November and the real one in January. I'm tired but it's going well. I promise I'm sleeping (mostly).
snippet: Hey Mom, thanks. Yeah, I'm staying on top of the Thursday sessions and logging m...
subject: Re: CHT study check-in

body: Good to hear. Take it one week at a time. Come for Sunday dinner and don't bring your notes this time — you need a break. We'll see you at 5. Love you.
snippet: Good to hear. Take it one week at a time. Come for Sunday dinner and don't bring...
subject: Re: CHT study check-in

body:
Dear Meghan Douglas,

Your federal student loan statement is ready. As of the October 1, 2026 billing cycle, your current principal balance is $51,687.42 at a posted interest rate of 5.50% APR. This reflects the two most recent interest postings and one additional principal payment applied since the prior statement. The next monthly payment of $350.00 is due October 28, 2026.

Please note this current balance of $51,687.42 supersedes any earlier figure carried in your records. Log in to view the full amortization schedule.

FedLoan Servicing
snippet: Your federal student loan statement is ready. As of the October 1, 2026 billing cycle, your current principal balance is $51,687.42 at a posted interest rate of 5.50% APR...
subject: Your federal student loan statement is ready

body:
Aloha Meghan,

Confirming your reservation at Sunrise Lanai for Saturday, October 24 at 10:00 AM under the name Douglas. We have you updated to a party of 7. Your note added one more guest (Justin) after the original booking, so the table is now set for 7 rather than the earlier count of 6.

Please let us know by Thursday if the final headcount changes again. We look forward to hosting Maya's birthday brunch.

Mahalo,
Sunrise Lanai, Kailua
snippet: Confirming your reservation at Sunrise Lanai for Saturday, October 24 at 10:00 AM under the name Douglas. We have you updated to a party of 7...
subject: Reservation confirmed - Sunrise Lanai, party of 7, Oct 24

body:
Hi Meghan,

I reviewed the CHT hand-therapy hour log at our quarterly cross-check and signed off on the supervised-versus-solo split through the summer. After reviewing the sign-offs I reclassified 12 hours from solo back to supervised, so the reconciled totals are 1,633 supervised / 1,214 solo (total 2,847).

Two weeks are still missing my signature and I could not sign them yet: the week of 2026-07-13 and the week of 2026-08-24. Please do not treat those two weeks as signed until I confirm them. Everything else is countersigned.

Dr. Elaine Park
snippet: I reviewed the CHT hand-therapy hour log at our quarterly cross-check and signed off on the supervised-versus-solo split through the summer...
subject: CHT hour log - supervisor sign-off and two pending weeks

body:
Dear Meghan Douglas,

This is your invoice for the Certified Hand Therapist (CHT) certification examination. The registration fee is $520.00, due at the time you submit your application for the January 9, 2027 exam window at the Honolulu testing center.

No payment has been received yet. Your registration will be held until the fee is submitted.

Hand Therapy Certification Commission (HTCC)
snippet: This is your invoice for the Certified Hand Therapist (CHT) certification examination. The registration fee is $520.00...
subject: CHT exam registration invoice - $520.00 due

body:
Hi Meghan,

Here are the last two invoices remaining on your Hand Therapy Review Course enrollment before the December final review session:

- Invoice R-11: $375.00 (due November 5, 2026)
- Invoice R-12: $375.00 (due December 3, 2026)

That clears your balance for the course. Reply if you would like to switch to a single combined payment.

Hand Therapy Review Course billing

subject: Review course - last two invoices ($375.00 each)

Aloha Meghan,

Oahu Travel Desk
